/health.purpose: Service liveness and model availability status.

/model-info.purpose: Expose trained model metadata for traceability.
/model-info.expected_output: model_type, model_version, feature_names, threshold and training metadata

/metrics.purpose: Expose runtime counters and average prediction latency.
/metrics.expected_output: request_count, prediction_count, anomaly_count, normal_count, average_latency_ms, model_loaded

/predict.purpose: Score one sensor reading and return anomaly decision.
/predict.expected_output: is_anomaly, anomaly_score, threshold, model_version, timestamp, input
